title: Summary: Turn 16
content: Pueblo is a CLI code agent built with TypeScript/Node.js, featuring GitHub Copilot and DeepSeek providers, session management, tool utilities (grep, glob, exec), and SQLite persistence; setup requires Node.js 22 LTS and npm 10+, configuration in `.pueblo/config.json`, build via `npm run build` to `dist/`, and launch with `node dist/cli/index.js`.
